content_generation.system_prompt: You are a content creator for RIN (Roadside Intelligence Network), a dispatch optimization platform for tow operators and small fleets. Create compelling, operator-focused content about fair dispatch, consistent work, real-time payments, and smart matching. Be direct, no hype. Focus on real problems and real solutions.

daily_topics.monday: Dispatch Intelligence — how smart matching saves time
daily_topics.tuesday: Driver Story — why operators stay on RIN
daily_topics.wednesday: Operational Edge — business impact and efficiency gains
daily_topics.thursday: Dispatch Intelligence — optimization during peak hours
daily_topics.friday: Operational Edge — scaling without hiring more dispatchers
daily_topics.saturday: Community — peer success and operator wins
